title: Wavin India Holdings Services is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Wavin India Holdings Services is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India Holdings Services:
Wavin India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India Holdings Services!
